chunks.text: At grandmother 's house, we began to talk about our future dreams.
My dream is to be an English teacher.
To be a good teacher, I study English hard every day.
English is an important language to learn.
I want to talk with people from many countries.
On my shelf, I have many books to read.
One day, I hope to teach children.
In the future, I want to help many people.
Grandmother listened quietly and said with a smile, “ Keep that dream.
